Caruana, Fabiano (2795) - Wei, Yi (2754)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 | Open (Chess.com) [03] 2026.03.31
A15 English opening

1.Nf3 Nf6 2.c4 c5 3.g3 g6 4.Nc3 d5 5.cxd5 Nxd5 6.Bg2 Bg7 7.Qa4+ Nc6 8.Ng5 Nb6 9.Bxc6+ bxc6 10.Qxc6+ Bd7 11.Qxc5 h6 12.Nf3 Rc8 13.Qa5 Bh3 14.Qb5+ Nd7 15.Rg1 O-O 16.g4 Rc5 17.Qb3 Ne5 18.Nxe5 Rxe5 19.Nd1

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:10 TOO SHORT FOR TIMESTAMPS
11:20 Standings after ROUND 2
